source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the figure shown, when the temperature changes, the parameters of the fixed bias common-emitter amplifier circuit are affected, causing the quiescent operating point to shift from \( Q_{1} \) to \( Q_{2} \). The correct statement is
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The current amplification factor of the transistor increases

choice_map.B: The voltage between the collector and emitter \( U_{\mathrm{CE}} \) increases
choice_map.D: The current amplification factor of the transistor increases
